description: Terrestrial Energy Inc. produces carbon free nuclear energy in North Carolina. It offers Pre-construction services, such as site selection and site and use-specific engineering studies for construction and licensing planning preparation; construction services and component supply; and post construction IMSR Core-unit supply and fuel supply. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
